positive: A whimsical and stylish celestial map featuring a stylized constellation of glowing geometric lines and interconnected planets. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, like a patch or a repeating pattern. Dominant colors are deep sapphire blue, ethereal lavender, and vibrant gold accents. The style is minimalist, geometric-graphic illustration, inspired by Art Deco celestial charts and modern scientific diagrams. The planets should have clean, bold silhouettes and subtle radial gradients. The overall feel is elegant, dreamy, and highly adaptable for apparel printing. Full bleed, vector-like quality, sharp focus, high contrast.
negative: blur, grainy, photorealistic, 3d rendering, noise, artifacts, text, watermarks, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, poorly drawn
